title: Small Wall Shelf with Hooks
summary: A compact two-shelf wall unit with scrolled sides, hooks, and cove-moulding trim. The matched scroll-cut sides are the make-or-break step.
description:
A small wall-mounted shelf for a bath or entry: two shelves between decoratively scrolled sides, a hook rail, and cove moulding for a finished, built-in look. It's a satisfying build that punches above its size because of the shaped sides and the trim.

The scroll pattern on the sides is the hardest part and the part people notice. Transfer the pattern to both 1x8 sides, cut with a jigsaw, and — critically — make the two match. Your 1x8s may vary slightly in width, so cut the shelves and trim to fit the actual assembled unit rather than the nominal numbers.

Assembly is friendly: pocket holes or 2" finish nails and glue hold the shelves, with a 10" gap between them. The base attaches to the bottom shelf as well as the sides for strength. Miter the cove moulding corners at 45° (keep the moulding to 3/4" x 3/4" or smaller so it suits the scale) and tack it on. Hang the finished shelf by screwing through the 1x6 base into a wall stud.

tools.note: One joinery option; 2" nails or screws and glue also work.
Cuts the matched scroll pattern on the sides.

cutList.note: Scroll pattern cut to match with a jigsaw.

steps.title: Cut the matching scrolled sides
steps.body: Transfer the scroll pattern to both 1x8 sides and cut with a jigsaw, making sure both ends match, and sand any rough areas. Your 1x8s may vary slightly in width, so plan to cut shelves and trim to the actual assembled dimensions.

steps.title: Attach the shelves
steps.body: Attach the shelves to the sides — pocket holes, or 2" finish nails/screws and glue. Leave a 10" space between the shelves.

steps.title: Add the optional divider and base
steps.body: If you want the center partition, fasten it in place with 2" finish nails and glue (pocket holes won't fit here). Then attach the 1x6 base, fastening to the bottom shelf as well as the sides for strength.

steps.title: Add the crown and back
steps.body: Add the front crown with 1-1/4" finish nails and glue, then the end pieces cut to fit (your 1x8s vary, so measure). Attach the 1/4" back to square the unit.

steps.title: Add cove moulding, hooks, and hang
steps.body: Miter the cove moulding corners at 45° (keep it to 3/4" x 3/4" or smaller for the scale) and glue and tack it on with 1-1/4" nails. Mount the hooks, sand, and finish. Hang by screwing through the 1x6 base into a wall stud.

images.alt: Small wall shelf with scrolled sides, hooks, and cove moulding
